summary: Middle East conflict threatening Strait of Hormuz causing energy supply disruptions. US intervention in Venezuela. Trade/tariff uncertainty persists. IMF forecasts global growth at 3.1%, headline inflation at 4.4% for 2026. NATO posturing in Greenland. US midterms adding political uncertainty.
